note: Development-pipeline (flywheel) view: 8 hypotheses x 5 stages (Research/Genetics/Models/Trials/Results) with typed dots and lineage edges. Built by scripts/build_flywheel.py.

hypotheses.label: Synaptic / neuronal resilience
hypotheses.statement: Preserve synapses, neuronal function, plasticity, and resistance to toxic pathology.

hypotheses.label: Vascular / cerebrovascular
hypotheses.statement: Treat vascular dysfunction, blood-brain barrier injury, small-vessel disease, or perfusion.

hypotheses.label: Lipid metabolism / APOE
hypotheses.statement: Modify lipid handling, ApoE biology, cholesterol transport, or ApoE isoform effects.

hypotheses.label: Amyloid processing
hypotheses.statement: Reduce toxic amyloid production, aggregation, or plaque burden.

hypotheses.label: Microglia / innate immunity
hypotheses.statement: Reset damaging or insufficient microglial responses, complement, phagocytosis, or inflammatory tone.

hypotheses.label: Epigenetic / transcriptional
hypotheses.statement: Modify disease-state gene expression programs, chromatin regulation, or cell-state transitions.

hypotheses.label: Endocytosis / endosomal trafficking
hypotheses.statement: Restore intracellular trafficking, receptor recycling, autophagy-lysosomal handling, or vesicle biology.

hypotheses.label: Tau / neurofibrillary pathology
hypotheses.statement: Prevent tau phosphorylation, aggregation, spreading, or downstream neuronal toxicity.
